name: Sangrita
recipeIngredient: 6 Red ripe tomatoes; peeled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomatoes and remove any seeds.
2. Mix the diced tomatoes with orange juice in a bowl.
3. Add the chopped green chiles, lime juice, sugar, and salt to the tomato mixture.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
